backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a marketplace with product listings (create, edit, delete, get) and messaging system (send, get conversations, mark as read), using blob storage for images and validating inputs with comprehensive error handling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five high-confidence features related to debugging and fixing the chat functionality (ChatDialog, ConversationList, ProfilePage messages tab, query hooks, and error logging).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files describing the React application structure with TanStack Router, product listing pages, chat components, authentication hooks, and styling utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining warm earth-tone palette variables for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the application with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with protected routes for create listing, profile, and edit listing pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with authentication guards.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Horizontal scrollable category filter component with icons, displaying all unique categories from backend with an "All Categories" option to clear filters.
frontend/src/components/ChatDialog.tsx: Dialog component for viewing conversation history and sending messages with auto-scroll, mark-as-read functionality, comprehensive error handling with dismissible alerts, and detailed logging for debugging.
frontend/src/components/ConversationList: Displays a scrollable list of conversation cards with phone numbers, listing titles, last messages, timestamps, and unread counts. Shows an empty state when no conversations exist.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation (logo, sell item, profile, login/logout buttons), footer with attribution, and mobile login dialog. Conditionally renders UI based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/MobileLoginDialo: Dialog component for mobile number authentication with phone number validation (10 or 12 digits). Handles login submission and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product listing with image, title, price, category badge, and seller phone number. Links to detailed listing page with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with debounced onChange (300ms delay), clear button, and search icon. Manages local state and syncs with parent component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages ICP actor instances based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages identity state, login/logout flow, and authentication status with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMobileAuth.ts: Zustand store with persistence for mobile phone number authentication. Manages phone number state, login/logout actions, and initialization status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for managing product listings (fetch all, create, edit, delete, fetch user-specific) and chat messages, integrating with the backend actor and mobile authentication.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm earth-toned color palette (terracotta, sand) for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Form page for creating new product listings with fields for title, description, price, category, and image upload, including validation and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/EditListingPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing product listings, pre-populating fields with current listing data and allowing image replacement while preserving the original if unchanged.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main marketplace page displaying a hero banner, search bar, category filters, and a grid of product listings with optional unread message badge for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Detailed product view page showing full listing information, seller contact details, formatted price and timestamp, with chat functionality for authenticated non-owner users.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page component with tabs for user listings and messages, allowing users to view/edit/delete their listings and access conversations with buyers/sellers via a chat dialog.
frontend/src/utils/formatPhoneNumber.ts: Utility function that formats phone numbers into Indian format (XXXXX XXXXX) with optional +91 country code prefix.
frontend/src/utils/formatPrice.ts: Utility function that formats price values (bigint or number) as Indian Rupees using the Indian numbering system with ₹ symbol.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing an Android marketplace/classifieds app with known issues including chat message delivery failures, listing creation problems, and non-functional My Chats interface.
